identity.name: JaipurEyeVision Studio
identity.description: A high-fidelity, cinematic AI platform that blends the vibrancy of Jaipur with futuristic precision. Dark mode first, neon accents, glassmorphic surfaces.

typography.installation: Ensure 'Outfit', 'Plus Jakarta Sans', and 'Syne' are imported from Google Fonts in index.css

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 h-12

visual_enhancers.noise_overlay: fixed inset-0 w-full h-full pointer-events-none z-[9999] opacity-[0.03] bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

libraries.3d: react-three-fiber (only for hero if needed, otherwise CSS glows)

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 'ThemeToggle' but default to DARK mode.
For the Dashboard Sidebar, use a collapsible glassmorphic design.
For the Landing Page, use the 'Bento Grid' layout for features.
Ensure all forms use 'react-hook-form' with 'zod' validation.
Use the provided image URLs for specific sections.
Do NOT use gradients for text unless it's a very large heading.
Add the noise overlay to the body to give a film-grain texture.
Use 'Outfit' font for all Headings (h1-h6) and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for body.
The primary color #D946EF (Pink) is for high-priority CTAs only. Use #7C3AED (Violet) for secondary actions.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
